overview: A premium Agency Management System with a full lead pipeline — Kanban board, CSV/Excel import with verification, duplicate detection, activity logging, and seamless client conversion. Built for digital agencies to manage their entire sales and client workflow from one place.
features: Lead Kanban board with 6 pipeline stages and drag-and-drop
Detailed activity log per lead (Call, Message, Meeting with notes)
CSV and Excel lead import with preview and manual approval
Duplicate detection with yellow highlight and manual override
Convert lead to client with automatic pipeline cleanup
Follow-up date tracking with overdue highlighting
Full integration with existing Clients, Projects, and Analytics modules
